summary: The primary goal for treating this type of injury involves preserving functional integrity by distributing forces evenly across the repair site; thus, "Load Sharing" as an option fits well within these parameters due to its emphasis on shared stress management between components involved post-surgery or healing process. Agent1 chose B because it emphasizes even force application which supports recovery while minimizing risk factors associated with localized pressure leading potentially towards complications like
